_ml_agent_template.purpose: Reserved instructions for ML agents generating canonical Hito training-plan-v2 JSON.
_ml_agent_template.import_behavior: Accepted but ignored by Hito import. Do not treat this block as runtime truth.
runtime_truth_rules: Only plan truth belongs here: plan metadata, workout metadata, and segment prescriptions.
Do not invent app-state, UI state, sync state, database ids, session data, user auth state, or client-side flags.
Use one workout per calendar date.
Use ISO dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Use canonical training-plan-v2 field names whenever a canonical form exists.
rich_workout_rules: Prefer explicit workout_family, workout_identity, calendar_icon_key, goal_context, and metric_mode on every workout.
workout_family and calendar_icon_key must use one of: rest, recovery, easy, steady, long, tempo, intervals, progression, race, hills, trail.

workout_identity must use a supported Hito identity such as easy_aerobic_run, recovery_jog, steady_aerobic_run, long_aerobic_run, half_marathon_threshold_durability, distance_intervals, uphill_repeats, technical_trail_easy, or mountain_long_run_time_on_feet.
Keep legacy workout_type and source_workout_type for compatibility; source_workout_type should usually mirror workout_identity.
goal_context should be bounded plan-scoped context only, not raw comments, transcripts, prompts, or private notes.
metric_mode should describe whether this workout is effort, pace, heart_rate, or mixed guided and why numeric targets are or are not allowed.
segment_rules: Every workout must have a non-empty segments array.

Use segment_type values already supported by Hito: warmup, main, cooldown, recovery, rest, mobility, mobility_optional, strength, activation, drills, strides, recovery_jog, fueling, tempo_block, interval_block.
For simple time or distance segments, set duration_min or distance_km directly.
For interval_block, strides, or repeated tempo_block segments, prefer prescription.mode = repeats with repeat_count and children[].
Repeat children are the ordered list repeated N times. Work + Recover is one valid pattern, but Run + Walk or multi-part child sequences are also valid when supported.
Repeat set parents are structural only; child blocks own role, structure, target, and readback semantics.
Legacy flat work_distance/recovery_distance and pair-shaped repeat_unit/recovery_unit fields are retired; repeat sets must use prescription.children[].
target_rules: Target is for user-facing training cues only.
Prefer canonical keys like intensity, rpe, cue, and hint when benchmark or HR-zone truth is absent.
Use pace_min_per_km_range only when watch/app execution and usable benchmark truth exist.
Use hr_bpm_range only when real runner HR-zone/profile truth exists.
If extra structured target metadata is helpful, put it under target.extra as scalar key/value pairs only.
Do not place nested objects or arrays inside target.extra.
_ml_agent_template.non_canonical_field_rule: These fields may be present for compatibility, but Hito does not treat them as canonical persisted runtime truth. Do not rely on them for import success.
do_not_invent: Nested runtime objects outside the accepted compatibility placeholders
Fields not defined by the canonical contract unless they are clearly ignored compatibility placeholders
Numeric pace or heart-rate targets without the required runner truth

goal.goal_label: Finish a half marathon feeling controlled

runner_profile.primary_goal: Finish a half marathon feeling controlled
runner_profile.secondary_goal: Rebuild running durability without rushing intensity

training_constraints.intensity_distribution: Mostly easy running with one quality touch
training_constraints.progression_policy: Increase gradually and protect recovery weeks

metric_mode.reason: Template uses effort cues; add pace only with watch/app plus usable benchmark truth.

planned_workouts.title: Easy aerobic run
planned_workouts.summary: 50 min easy with calm aerobic control

metric_mode.reason: Rest day has no execution metric targets.
Template quality work uses effort cues until benchmark or HR-zone truth exists.

planned_workouts.title: Half marathon threshold durability
planned_workouts.summary: Controlled threshold touch without racing the workout

target.cue: Strong but repeatable; do not sprint the final minutes
Reset posture and breathing before the next controlled block

target.hint: Jog down, then walk if needed

metric_mode.reason: Template long run uses effort cues; numeric targets require runner-specific truth.

target.cue: Stay patient; this is durability, not a test
